hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【FINANCE】市场对美联储降息的希望正在迅速破灭；【WORLD】伊朗战争实时更新：以色列称其杀死了伊朗情报局长；【CRYPTO】在美联储做出决定之前，比特币的上涨面临“抛售新闻”的风险。

items.title: Markets' hopes for Fed interest rate cuts are rapidly fading away
items.summary: As both energy prices and inflation fears pop higher, expectations for cuts are sliding lower.
items.title_zh: 市场对美联储降息的希望正在迅速破灭
items.summary_zh: 随着能源价格和通胀担忧的加剧，削减开支的预期正在下降。

items.title: Iran War Live Updates: Israel Says It Killed Iran’s Intelligence Chief
items.summary: Esmaeil Khatib would be the latest high-ranking senior Iranian official to be killed in an airstrike. Israel intensified its assault against Iran-backed Hezbollah with attacks in Beirut and other Lebanese cities.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争实时更新：以色列称其杀死了伊朗情报局长
items.summary_zh: 埃斯梅尔·哈提卜将成为最新一位在空袭中丧生的伊朗高级官员。以色列加强了对伊朗支持的真主党的攻击，袭击了贝鲁特和其他黎巴嫩城市。

items.title: Bitcoin’s rally runs into 'sell the news' risk ahead of Fed decision
items.summary: Two Prime data shows post-meeting weakness dominates, even as markets price a Fed hold and limited rate cuts ahead.
items.title_zh: 在美联储做出决定之前，比特币的上涨面临“抛售新闻”的风险
items.summary_zh: 两项主要数据显示，尽管市场预计美联储将维持利率不变且未来降息有限，但会议后的疲软仍占主导地位。

items.title: The Fed issues its latest interest rate decision Wednesday. Here's what to expect
items.summary: The Federal Reserve has little choice but to stay on the sidelines this week.
items.title_zh: 美联储周三发布最新利率决定。这是值得期待的
items.summary_zh: 美联储本周别无选择，只能保持观望。

items.title: Bitcoin beat the S&P 500, Nasdaq Composite and gold since the start of the Iran war
items.summary: ProShares' Simeon Hyman is highlighting a bullish bitcoin trend.
items.title_zh: 自伊朗战争爆发以来，比特币击败了标准普尔 500 指数、纳斯达克综合指数和黄金
items.summary_zh: ProShares 的 Simeon Hyman 强调了看涨的比特币趋势。

items.title: Bitcoin quickly pulls back to $72,300 as Iran fears team up with poor U.S. inflation data
items.summary: The price of oil moved higher after reported attacks against Iran's South Pars gas field.
items.title_zh: 由于伊朗担忧加上美国通胀数据不佳，比特币迅速回落至 72,300 美元
items.summary_zh: 在伊朗南帕尔斯气田遭受袭击的报道后，油价上涨。

items.title: Powell's comments on oil, inflation are likely to guide bitcoin traders
items.summary: Your day-ahead look for March 18, 2026
items.title_zh: 鲍威尔对石油和通胀的评论可能会指导比特币交易者
items.summary_zh: 2026 年 3 月 18 日天气预报

items.title: Bitcoin holds steady at $74,000 as traders turn cautious before Fed meeting
items.summary: BTC consolidated with subdued volatility, while derivatives positioning and macro uncertainty signaled cautious market sentiment.
items.title_zh: 美联储会议前交易员变得谨慎，比特币稳定在 74,000 美元
items.summary_zh: 比特币在波动性减弱的情况下盘整，而衍生品头寸和宏观不确定性则表明市场情绪谨慎。

items.title: Bitcoin nears inflection point ahead of Fed meeting as liquidity and resistance collide, analysts say
items.summary: Bitcoin trades above $70,000 ahead of the FOMC decision, with analysts pointing to heavy macro influence and a key liquidity inflection.
items.title_zh: 分析师称，随着流动性和阻力的碰撞，比特币在美联储会议前接近拐点
items.summary_zh: 在 FOMC 做出决定之前，比特币交易价格已超过 70,000 美元，分析师指出宏观影响巨大且流动性发生关键性变化。

items.title: Strategy’s STRC-fueled bitcoin buying spree highlights sentiment-driven structural risks: K33
items.summary: Strategy's STRC-fueled bitcoin buying spree is helping to drive demand but introduces sentiment-sensitive structural risks, according to K33.
items.title_zh: Strategy的STRC推动的比特币购买热潮凸显了情绪驱动的结构性风险：K33
items.summary_zh: K33 表示，Strategy 的 STRC 推动的比特币购买热潮有助于推动需求，但也带来了对情绪敏感的结构性风险。

items.title: Equipping workers with insights about compensation
items.summary: New research shows Americans send nearly 3 million daily messages to ChatGPT asking about compensation and earnings, helping close the wage information gap.
items.title_zh: 为员工提供有关薪酬的见解
items.summary_zh: 新研究显示，美国人每天向 ChatGPT 发送近 300 万条消息，询问薪酬和收入，这有助于缩小工资信息差距。

items.title: Orlando Bravo pushes back on private markets criticism: 'Everybody's extremely comfortable'
items.summary: Bravo said deep sector expertise is separating winners from losers as artificial intelligence creates disruption across the software industry.
items.title_zh: 奥兰多布拉沃反驳私人市场批评：“每个人都非常舒服”
items.summary_zh: 布拉沃表示，随着人工智能对整个软件行业造成颠覆，深厚的行业专业知识正在将赢家与输家区分开来。

items.title: Apollo's John Zito questions private equity's software valuations: 'All the marks are wrong'
items.summary: While Wall Street figures have flagged risks in private credit, Apollo's Zito is among the first within private credit to candidly acknowledge weakness.
items.title_zh: Apollo 的 John Zito 质疑私募股权公司的软件估值：“所有标记都是错误的”
items.summary_zh: 尽管华尔街的数据已经指出了私人信贷的风险，但阿波罗的 Zito 是私人信贷领域最先坦诚承认疲软的人之一。

items.title: Holiday spending, export demand drive China’s economic momentum as Iran war headwinds loom
items.summary: Beijing tamped down its GDP growth target this year to a range of 4.5% to 5%, the least ambitious goal on record going back to the early 1990s.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争逆风逼近，假期消费、出口需求推动中国经济增长
items.summary_zh: 北京将今年的GDP增长目标下调至4.5%至5%，这是自20世纪90年代初以来有记录以来最不雄心勃勃的目标。

items.title: Dividend stocks are catching up to tech stocks on a key earnings metric at a critical time for the market
items.summary: Dividend stocks are closing the earnings growth gap with tech stocks, a reason for investors seeking safety in a volatile market to favor income opportunities.
items.title_zh: 在市场的关键时刻，股息股在一项关键盈利指标上正在追赶科技股
items.summary_zh: 股息股正在缩小与科技股的盈利增长差距，这是投资者在动荡的市场中寻求安全以青睐收入机会的原因。

items.title: Inside JPMorgan Chase's push to become the startup world’s new Silicon Valley Bank
items.summary: For JPMorgan Chase, winning the niche of startup banking from rivals is about more than just gaining deposits: It's a bet to future-proof the largest U.S. bank.
items.title_zh: 摩根大通致力于成为初创企业界的新硅谷银行
items.summary_zh: 对于摩根大通来说，从竞争对手手中赢得初创银行业务的利基市场不仅仅是获得存款：这是对美国最大银行面向未来的赌注。

items.title: Top US counterterrorism official resigns over Iran war, urging Trump to 'reverse course'
items.summary: National Counterterrorism Center Director Joe Kent says Trump "started this war due to pressure from Israel and its powerful American lobby".
items.title_zh: 美国高级反恐官员因伊朗战争辞职，敦促特朗普“扭转路线”
items.summary_zh: 国家反恐中心主任乔·肯特表示，特朗普“由于以色列及其强大的美国游说团体的压力而发动了这场战争”。

items.title: Italy warns Russian tanker could explode in Mediterranean at any time
items.summary: Italy is one of nine EU countries urging the European Commission to act over the Arctic Metagaz, drifting out of control in the Mediterranean Sea.
items.title_zh: 意大利警告俄罗斯油轮随时可能在地中海爆炸
items.summary_zh: 意大利是敦促欧盟委员会对地中海失控的北极 Metagaz 采取行动的九个欧盟国家之一。

items.title: Inside the Supply Line Delivering American Guns to Mexican Cartels
items.summary: A surge of weapons is flowing from the U.S. to Mexico. These firearms — sourced from gun shops, shows, websites and apps — are funneled across the border to fuel the country’s most violent crimes.
items.title_zh: 向墨西哥贩毒集团运送美国枪支的供应线内部
items.summary_zh: 大量武器正在从美国流向墨西哥。这些枪支来自枪支商店、表演、网站和应用程序，跨境流动，助长了该国最暴力的犯罪活动。

items.title: At Least 23 Killed in Nigeria as Insurgent Attacks Go On Despite U.S. Help
items.summary: A teaching hospital and two markets in the city of Maiduguri were hit in what a military spokesman said were suicide bombings by Boko Haram.
items.title_zh: 尽管有美国帮助，尼日利亚叛乱分子袭击仍造成至少 23 人死亡
items.summary_zh: 迈杜古里市的一家教学医院和两个市场遭到袭击，军方发言人称这是博科圣地的自杀式爆炸袭击。

items.title: Trump Signals He May Intervene in Cuba Following Iran and Venezuela
items.summary: Still at war with Iran and in control in Venezuela, President Trump is signaling that he is about to intervene in another country.
items.title_zh: 特朗普暗示他可能继伊朗和委内瑞拉之后对古巴进行干预
items.summary_zh: 特朗普总统仍在与伊朗交战并控制着委内瑞拉，他发出信号称他即将对另一个国家进行干预。

items.title: Bitrefill accuses North Korea-linked Lazarus hacker group for compromising 18,500 purchase records
items.summary: Bitrefill will cover the losses from operational capital.
items.title_zh: Bitrefill 指控与朝鲜有关的 Lazarus 黑客组织泄露了 18,500 条购买记录
items.summary_zh: Bitrefill 将弥补运营资本的损失。

items.title: Stripe and Paradigm’s Tempo blockchain integrates RedStone as data feed provider
items.summary: RedStone will provide continuous FX and stablecoin feeds enabling applications to price and settle transactions in local currencies.
items.title_zh: Stripe 和 Paradigm 的 Tempo 区块链集成 RedStone 作为数据馈送提供商
items.summary_zh: RedStone 将提供持续的外汇和稳定币数据源，使应用程序能够以当地货币定价和结算交易。

items.title: Wallet maker Tangem doubles annual revenue to more than $60 million as self-custody shifts toward ‘active’ use
items.summary: Tangem reported more than $60 million in revenue for 2025, marking a 102% year-over-year increase amid rising demand for hybrid cold storage.
items.title_zh: 随着自我托管转向“主动”使用，钱包制造商 Tangem 年收入翻了一番，达到 6000 万美元以上
items.summary_zh: Tangem 报告称，由于混合冷库需求不断增长，2025 年收入将超过 6000 万美元，同比增长 102%。

items.title: UK lawmakers urge ‘immediate ban’ on crypto political donations
items.summary: UK lawmakers call for immediate ban on crypto political donations, citing high risks and proposing binding moratorium.
items.title_zh: 英国立法者敦促“立即禁止”加密政治捐赠
items.summary_zh: 英国立法者呼吁立即禁止加密货币政治捐赠，理由是风险较高，并提议具有约束力的暂停。

items.title: Rakuten fixes issues twice as fast with Codex
items.summary: Rakuten uses Codex, the coding agent from OpenAI, to ship software faster and safer, reducing MTTR 50%, automating CI/CD reviews, and delivering full-stack builds in weeks.
items.title_zh: Rakuten 使用 Codex 解决问题的速度提高了一倍
items.summary_zh: Rakuten 使用 OpenAI 的编码代理 Codex 来更快、更安全地交付软件，将 MTTR 降低 50%，自动化 CI/CD 审查，并在几周内交付全栈构建。

items.title: Can AI help predict which heart-failure patients will worsen within a year?
items.summary: Researchers at MIT, Mass General Brigham, and Harvard Medical School developed a deep-learning model to forecast a patient’s heart failure prognosis up to a year in advance.
items.title_zh: 人工智能能否帮助预测哪些心力衰竭患者会在一年内病情恶化？
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院、麻省总医院和哈佛医学院的研究人员开发了一种深度学习模型，可以提前一年预测患者的心力衰竭预后。

items.title: Bitcoin is stuck below $75,000 even after landmark SEC, CFTC crypto rules
items.summary: Bitcoin remains stuck near key resistance around $75,000, leaving the broader market in limbo.
items.title_zh: 即使在具有里程碑意义的 SEC、CFTC 加密规则出台之后，比特币仍停留在 75,000 美元以下
items.summary_zh: 比特币仍停留在 75,000 美元附近的关键阻力位附近，使大盘陷入困境。

items.title: S&P Dow Jones Indices licenses brand for first official S&P 500 perp to trade on Hyperliquid
items.summary: XYZ, a perps provider on Hyperliquid, is launching “the first officially licensed perpetual derivative contract” based on the S&P 500.
items.title_zh: 标普道琼斯指数授权首个官方标普 500 指数在 Hyperliquid 上交易的品牌
items.summary_zh: XYZ 是 Hyperliquid 上的永续合约提供商，正在推出基于标准普尔 500 指数的“第一个官方许可的永续衍生品合约”。

items.title: Bhutan moves over $72 million in bitcoin amid growing outflows: Arkham
items.summary: Combined with earlier transfers reported by Arkham, Bhutan has moved more than $110 million in bitcoin so far this year.
items.title_zh: 不丹在资金外流不断增加的情况下转移了超过 7200 万美元的比特币：Arkham
items.summary_zh: 加上 Arkham 此前报道的转账情况，今年迄今为止，不丹已转移了超过 1.1 亿美元的比特币。

items.title: Moody’s launches Token Integration Engine to bring credit analysis onchain, starting with Canton
items.summary: Credit ratings agency Moody's has launched a new Token Integration Engine to bring its credit analysis onchain.
items.title_zh: 穆迪推出代币集成引擎，将信用分析引入链上，从 Canton 开始
items.summary_zh: 信用评级机构穆迪推出了新的代币集成引擎，将其信用分析带到链上。

items.title: Wayfair boosts catalog accuracy and support speed with OpenAI
items.summary: Wayfair uses OpenAI models to improve ecommerce support and product catalog accuracy, automating ticket triage and enhancing millions of product attributes at scale.
items.title_zh: Wayfair 通过 OpenAI 提高目录准确性和支持速度
items.summary_zh: Wayfair 使用 OpenAI 模型来改善电子商务支持和产品目录准确性，自动进行票证分类并大规模增强数百万个产品属性。

items.title: From model to agent: Equipping the Responses API with a computer environment
items.summary: How OpenAI built an agent runtime using the Responses API, shell tool, and hosted containers to run secure, scalable agents with files, tools, and state.
items.title_zh: 从模型到代理：为 Responses API 配备计算机环境
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 如何使用响应 API、shell 工具和托管容器构建代理运行时，以使用文件、工具和状态运行安全、可扩展的代理。

items.title: Improving instruction hierarchy in frontier LLMs
items.summary: IH-Challenge trains models to prioritize trusted instructions, improving instruction hierarchy, safety steerability, and resistance to prompt injection attacks.
items.title_zh: 改善前沿法学硕士的教学层次
items.summary_zh: IH-Challenge 训练模型以优先考虑可信指令，改善指令层次结构、安全可操纵性以及对即时注入攻击的抵抗力。

items.title: Nemotron 3 Nano 4B: A Compact Hybrid Model for Efficient Local AI
items.title_zh: Nemotron 3 Nano 4B：用于高效本地人工智能的紧​​凑混合模型

items.title: How our open-source AI model SpeciesNet is helping to promote wildlife conservation
items.summary: An overview of SpeciesNet, our open-source AI model that is helping people around the world protect and conserve wildlife.
items.title_zh: 我们的开源人工智能模型 SpeciesNet 如何帮助促进野生动物保护
items.summary_zh: SpeciesNet 概述，我们的开源人工智能模型正在帮助世界各地的人们保护野生动物。

items.title: The latest AI news we announced in February
items.summary: Here are Google’s latest AI updates from February 2026
items.title_zh: 我们二月份公布的最新人工智能新闻
items.summary_zh: 以下是 Google 自 2026 年 2 月起最新的 AI 更新

items.title: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite: Built for intelligence at scale
items.summary: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite is our fastest and most cost-efficient Gemini 3 series model yet.
items.title_zh: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite：专为大规模智能而打造
items.summary_zh: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite 是我们迄今为止速度最快、最具成本效益的 Gemini 3 系列型号。

items.title: MIT-IBM Watson AI Lab seed to signal: Amplifying early-career faculty impact
items.summary: Academia-industry relationship is an early-stage accelerator, supporting professional progress and research.
items.title_zh: MIT-IBM Watson AI 实验室种子信号：扩大早期职业教师的影响力
items.summary_zh: 学术界与工业界的关系是早期加速器，支持专业进步和研究。

items.title: 3 Questions: Building predictive models to characterize tumor progression
items.summary: Assistant Professor Matthew Jones is working to decode molecular processes on the genetic, epigenetic, and microenvironment levels to anticipate how and when tumors evolve to resist treatment.
items.title_zh: 3 个问题：建立预测模型来表征肿瘤进展
items.summary_zh: 助理教授 Matthew Jones 致力于解码遗传、表观遗传和微环境水平上的分子过程，以预测肿瘤如何以及何时进化以抵抗治疗。

items.title: How Joseph Paradiso’s sensing innovations bridge the arts, medicine, and ecology
items.summary: From early motion-sensing platforms to environmental monitoring, the professor and head of the Program in Media Arts and Sciences has turned decades of cross-disciplinary research into real-world impact.
items.title_zh: Joseph Paradiso 的传感创新如何架起艺术、医学和生态学的桥梁
items.summary_zh: 从早期的运动传感平台到环境监测，这位教授兼媒体艺术与科学项目的负责人将数十年的跨学科研究转化为现实世界的影响。

items.title: Improving AI models’ ability to explain their predictions
items.summary: A new approach could help users know whether to trust a model’s predictions in safety-critical applications like health care and autonomous driving.
items.title_zh: 提高人工智能模型解释其预测的能力
items.summary_zh: 一种新方法可以帮助用户知道是否信任模型在医疗保健和自动驾驶等安全关键应用中的预测。

items.title: Mastercard says it's acquiring stablecoin startup BVNK in $1.8 billion bet on future of payments
items.summary: Stablecoin startups have been a hot commodity since the reelection of President Donald Trump in late 2024 ushered in a new era of crypto-friendly regulation.
items.title_zh: 万事达卡表示将斥资 18 亿美元收购稳定币初创公司 BVNK，押注未来支付
items.summary_zh: 自 2024 年底唐纳德·特朗普总统连任开启加密货币友好型监管新时代以来，稳定币初创公司一直是热门商品。

items.title: China talks up oil sufficiency as Trump seeks Beijing's help on securing Hormuz energy route
items.summary: The statistics bureau said that China's energy supply is "relatively strong," while announcing an uptick in domestic production.
items.title_zh: 特朗普寻求北京帮助确保霍尔木兹能源路线安全，中国谈论石油供应充足
items.summary_zh: 国家统计局表示，中国能源供应“相对强劲”，同时宣布国内产量有所增加。

items.title: Total repression and air strikes bring unrelenting dread for Iranians
items.summary: Tehran residents tell the BBC they're caught between US-Israeli bombing and an Iranian regime trying to reassert its power.
items.title_zh: 全面镇压和空袭给伊朗人带来无休无止的恐惧
items.summary_zh: 德黑兰居民告诉英国广播公司，他们夹在美国和以色列的轰炸和试图重申其权力的伊朗政权之间。

items.title: Death of Ali Larijani deepens crisis at heart of Iran's leadership
items.summary: Larijani has long been seen as one of the Islamic Republic's most experienced and influential policy makers.
items.title_zh: 阿里·拉里贾尼之死加深了伊朗领导层的核心危机
items.summary_zh: 拉里贾尼长期以来一直被视为伊斯兰共和国最有经验和最有影响力的政策制定者之一。

items.title: India's cheap weight-loss drugs could reshape global obesity fight
items.summary: With India’s semaglutide patent expiring on 20 March, about 50 branded generics are expected to enter the market.
items.title_zh: 印度廉价减肥药可能重塑全球肥胖斗争
items.summary_zh: 印度索马鲁肽专利将于 3 月 20 日到期，预计将有约 50 个品牌仿制药进入市场。

items.title: US judge orders Trump administration to reopen Voice of America
items.summary: Some 85% of VOA staff were laid off by Trump who accused the international broadcaster of bias.
items.title_zh: 美国法官命令特朗普政府重新开放美国之音
items.summary_zh: 特朗普指责美国之音存在偏见，解雇了大约 85% 的美国之音员工。

items.title: Air strike hit Kabul rehab centre as patients ate dinner, survivor tells BBC
items.summary: The exact number killed in Monday night's strike by Pakistan is still not known, but is feared to be in the hundreds.
items.title_zh: 幸存者告诉英国广播公司，空袭袭击了喀布尔康复中心，患者正在吃晚饭
items.summary_zh: 周一晚上巴基斯坦袭击中丧生的确切人数仍不清楚，但恐怕有数百人。

items.title: Spanish king reopens debate on conquest of Mexico by acknowledging 'abuse'
items.summary: King Felipe appears to have helped thaw frosty relations with Mexico while reviving a fierce debate over events 500 years ago.
items.title_zh: 西班牙国王承认“虐待”，重新开启关于征服墨西哥的辩论
items.summary_zh: 费利佩国王似乎帮助解冻了与墨西哥的冷淡关系，同时又恢复了对 500 年前事件的激烈辩论。

items.title: US Attorney General Bondi formally summoned to Congress in Epstein case
items.summary: It comes weeks after a Republican lawmaker accused the justice department of a "cover-up" in releasing the Epstein files.
items.title_zh: 美国司法部长邦迪因爱泼斯坦案被正式传唤至国会
items.summary_zh: 几周前，一名共和党议员指责司法部“掩盖”公布爱泼斯坦的文件。

items.title: Water supply cut in Moldova after oil spill blamed on Russian strike in Ukraine
items.summary: Moldova has imposed a 15-day state of alert in the Dniester river basin as a precaution.
items.title_zh: 俄罗斯袭击乌克兰石油泄漏导致摩尔多瓦供水中断
items.summary_zh: 作为预防措施，摩尔多瓦已在德涅斯特河流域实施为期 15 天的戒备状态。

items.title: Netanyahu Hopes Strikes on Iran Will Lead to Uprising and Regime Change
items.summary: Israeli attacks have targeted the command centers of Iran’s repressive, internal security forces in hopes that Iranians will overthrow their rulers. Some see that as wishful thinking.
items.title_zh: 内塔尼亚胡希望对伊朗的打击将导致起义和政权更迭
items.summary_zh: 以色列的袭击目标是伊朗镇压的内部安全部队的指挥中心，希望伊朗人推翻他们的统治者。有些人认为这是一厢情愿的想法。

items.title: He Lost a Leg for Russia. Then, He Says, His Country Betrayed Him.
items.summary: Imprisoned for murder, Aleksandr Abbasov-Derskhan sought a new start in life and freedom by signing up to fight in Ukraine. But he says promised benefits proved illusory.
items.title_zh: 他为俄罗斯失去了一条腿。然后，他说，他的国家背叛了他。
items.summary_zh: 亚历山大·阿巴索夫-德斯坎 (Aleksandr Abbasov-Derskhan) 因谋杀入狱，通过报名参加乌克兰战斗，寻求生活和自由的新开始。但他表示，承诺的好处被证明是虚幻的。

items.title: The Faroe Islands Are Changing Some of Europe’s Strictest Abortion Rules
items.summary: A new law allowing abortion up to 12 weeks will be a major shift in an archipelago of 55,000 people, and there are strong feelings on both sides.
items.title_zh: 法罗群岛正在改变欧洲一些最严格的堕胎规则
items.summary_zh: 允许堕胎长达 12 周的新法律对于这个拥有 55,000 人口的群岛来说将是一个重大转变，双方都有强烈的感情。

items.title: Trump’s Friendship With Japan’s Leader Takaichi Faces Test Over Iran
items.summary: In Washington on Thursday, President Trump is expected to press Sanae Takaichi for military help in the Strait of Hormuz. But she faces constraints on what she can offer.
items.title_zh: 特朗普与日本领导人高市的友谊因伊朗问题面临考验
items.summary_zh: 周四，特朗普总统预计将在华盛顿向高市早苗施压，要求其在霍尔木兹海峡提供军事援助。但她所能提供的服务却受到限制。

items.title: Dozens Dead in Pakistani Airstrike on Kabul
items.summary: The attack hit a drug rehabilitation facility, and Afghanistan vowed to retaliate, risking an escalation of the conflict between the two countries.
items.title_zh: 巴基斯坦空袭喀布尔造成数十人死亡
items.summary_zh: 这次袭击袭击了一个戒毒所，阿富汗誓言要进行报复，冒着两国冲突升级的风险。

items.title: What to Know About Ali Larijani, Iran’s Top Security Official
items.summary: One of Ayatollah Ali Khamenei’s closest confidants, Mr. Larijani emerged as the face of the government after Mr. Khamenei was killed.
items.title_zh: 关于伊朗最高安全官员阿里·拉里贾尼 (Ali Larijani) 的了解
items.summary_zh: 拉里贾尼是阿亚图拉阿里·哈梅内伊最亲密的心腹之一，在哈梅内伊被杀后成为政府的代言人。

items.title: RedotPay executive turnover clouds crypto payments firm's $4 billion U.S. IPO ambition
items.summary: The company's internal strain, including reports of required long working hours, is overshadowing its push for a U.S. listing.
items.title_zh: RedotPay 高管离职，给加密支付公司 40 亿美元的美国 IPO 雄心蒙上阴影
items.summary_zh: 该公司的内部压力，包括有关要求长时间工作的报道，正在为其在美国上市的努力蒙上阴影。

items.title: UK lawmakers urge ‘immediate moratorium’ on crypto political donations
items.summary: The committee highlighted that the fast payment traits of crypto, along with tools like mixers, tumblers, and AI-assisted splitting of payments below the £500 reporting threshold.
items.title_zh: 英国立法者敦促“立即暂停”加密货币政治捐款
items.summary_zh: 该委员会强调了加密货币的快速支付特性，以及混合器、滚筒等工具，以及人工智能辅助的低于 500 英镑报告门槛的支付分割。

items.title: XRP hovers near $14 million options battleground that could sway trading
items.summary: XRP is trading around $1.50, just above a key options cluster at $1.40 on Deribit.
items.title_zh: XRP 徘徊在 1400 万美元附近的期权战场，可能会影响交易
items.summary_zh: XRP 的交易价格约为 1.50 美元，略高于 Deribit 上 1.40 美元的关键期权集群。

items.title: Stratton wins Illinois Senate primary, defeating crypto-backed Krishnamoorthi
items.summary: Lieutenant Governor Juliana Stratton is now likely to be the next Senator from Illinois, after defeating Rep. Raja Krishnamoorthi, who enjoyed major backing from crypto PAC Fairshake.
items.title_zh: 斯特拉顿赢得伊利诺伊州参议院初选，击败加密货币支持的克里希纳莫提
items.summary_zh: 副州长 Juliana Stratton 在击败众议员 Raja Krishnamoorthi 后，现在很可能成为伊利诺伊州的下一任参议员，后者得到了加密 PAC Fairshake 的大力支持。

items.title: Kenya seeks public comment on draft VASP rules covering licensing and stablecoin backing
items.summary: Kenya’s National Treasury seeks public comments on draft 2026 VASP rules, including stablecoin reserve, licensing, and fees.
items.title_zh: 肯尼亚就涉及许可和稳定币支持的 VASP 规则草案征求公众意见
items.summary_zh: 肯尼亚国家财政部就 2026 年 VASP 规则草案征求公众意见，包括稳定币储备、许可和费用。

items.title: Stablecoin payments firm TransFi raises $19 million for global expansion
items.summary: The company plans to use the funds to expand across Southeast Asia, South Asia, the Middle East, Latin America and Africa.
items.title_zh: 稳定币支付公司 TransFi 融资 1900 万美元用于全球扩张
items.summary_zh: 该公司计划利用这笔资金在东南亚、南亚、中东、拉丁美洲和非洲进行扩张。

items.title: Introducing GPT-5.4 mini and nano
items.summary: GPT-5.4 mini and nano are smaller, faster versions of GPT-5.4 optimized for coding, tool use, multimodal reasoning, and high-volume API and sub-agent workloads.
items.title_zh: GPT-5.4 mini 和 nano 简介
items.summary_zh: GPT-5.4 mini 和 nano 是 GPT-5.4 的更小、更快的版本，针对编码、工具使用、多模式推理以及大容量 API 和子代理工作负载进行了优化。

items.title: Why Codex Security Doesn’t Include a SAST Report
items.summary: A deep dive into why Codex Security doesn’t rely on traditional SAST, instead using AI-driven constraint reasoning and validation to find real vulnerabilities with fewer false positives.
items.title_zh: 为什么 Codex 安全性不包括 SAST 报告
items.summary_zh: 深入探讨为什么 Codex Security 不依赖传统的 SAST，而是使用人工智能驱动的约束推理和验证来发现真正的漏洞，并减少误报。

items.title: Designing AI agents to resist prompt injection
items.summary: How ChatGPT defends against prompt injection and social engineering by constraining risky actions and protecting sensitive data in agent workflows.
items.title_zh: 设计人工智能代理以抵抗即时注入
items.summary_zh: ChatGPT 如何通过限制危险行为和保护代理工作流程中的敏感数据来防御即时注入和社会工程。

items.title: New ways to learn math and science in ChatGPT
items.summary: ChatGPT introduces interactive visual explanations for math and science, helping students explore formulas, variables, and concepts in real time.
items.title_zh: 在 ChatGPT 中学习数学和科学的新方法
items.summary_zh: ChatGPT 引入了数学和科学的交互式视觉解释，帮助学生实时探索公式、变量和概念。

items.title: OpenAI to acquire Promptfoo
items.summary: OpenAI is acquiring Promptfoo, an AI security platform that helps enterprises identify and remediate vulnerabilities in AI systems during development.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 收购 Promptfoo
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 正在收购 Promptfoo，这是一个人工智能安全平台，可帮助企业在开发过程中识别和修复人工智能系统中的漏洞。

items.title: State of Open Source on Hugging Face: Spring 2026
items.title_zh: 拥抱开源的现状：2026 年春季

items.title_zh: Holotron-12B - 高吞吐量计算机使用代理

items.title_zh: Hugging Face Hub 上引入存储桶

items.title: Keep the Tokens Flowing: Lessons from 16 Open-Source RL Libraries
items.title_zh: 保持代币流动：来自 16 个开源 RL 库的经验教训

items.title: Granite 4.0 1B Speech: Compact, Multilingual, and Built for the Edge
items.title_zh: Granite 4.0 1B 语音：紧凑、多语言、专为边缘而打造

items.title: Ulysses Sequence Parallelism: Training with Million-Token Contexts
items.title_zh: Ulysses 序列并行性：使用百万令牌上下文进行训练

items.title: LeRobot v0.5.0: Scaling Every Dimension
items.title_zh: 乐机器人 v0.5.0：扩展各个维度

items.title: Bringing Robotics AI to Embedded Platforms: Dataset Recording, VLA Fine‑Tuning, and On‑Device Optimizations
items.title_zh: 将机器人人工智能引入嵌入式平台：数据集记录、VLA 微调和设备上优化

items.title_zh: 引入模块化扩散器 - 用于扩散管道的可组合构建块

items.title: Bringing the power of Personal Intelligence to more people
items.summary: We're expanding Personal Intelligence across AI Mode in Search, the Gemini app and Gemini in Chrome.
items.title_zh: 将个人智能的力量带给更多人
items.summary_zh: 我们正在将个人智能扩展到搜索中的 AI 模式、Gemini 应用程序和 Chrome 中的 Gemini。

items.title: Our latest investment in open source security for the AI era
items.summary: Google is making new investments, building new tools and developing code security to improve open source security.
items.title_zh: 我们对人工智能时代开源安全的最新投资
items.summary_zh: 谷歌正在进行新的投资、构建新的工具并开发代码安全性，以提高开源安全性。

items.title: How AI is helping improve heart health in rural Australia
items.summary: A new Google AI initiative aims to improve heart health outcomes for people living in remote Australian communities.
items.title_zh: 人工智能如何帮助改善澳大利亚农村地区的心脏健康
items.summary_zh: 一项新的谷歌人工智能计划旨在改善生活在澳大利亚偏远社区的人们的心脏健康状况。

items.title: Gemini in Google Sheets just achieved state-of-the-art performance.
items.summary: Today we announced new beta features for Gemini in Sheets to help you create, organize and edit entire sheets, from basic tasks to complex data analysis — just describe …
items.title_zh: Google Sheets 中的 Gemini 刚刚实现了最先进的性能。
items.summary_zh: 今天，我们宣布了 Gemini in Sheets 的新测试版功能，可帮助您创建、组织和编辑整个工作表，从基本任务到复杂的数据分析 - 只需描述......

items.title: Ask a Techspert: How does AI understand my visual searches?
items.summary: Learn more about AI Mode in Search’s query fan-out method for visual search.
items.title_zh: 询问技术专家：人工智能如何理解我的视觉搜索？
items.summary_zh: 详细了解搜索中用于视觉搜索的 AI 模式的查询扇出方法。

items.title: Use Canvas in AI Mode to get things done and bring your ideas to life, right in Search.
items.summary: Canvas in AI Mode is now available for everyone in the U.S. Plus, it can now help you draft documents or build interactive tools.
items.title_zh: 在 AI 模式下使用 Canvas 即可在搜索中完成工作并将您的想法变为现实。
items.summary_zh: AI 模式下的 Canvas 现已可供美国所有人使用，此外，它现在还可以帮助您起草文档或构建交互式工具。

items.title: Create new worlds in Project Genie with these 4 tips
items.summary: Learn more about Google DeepMind’s Project Genie and how to write prompts to create your own worlds.
items.title_zh: 利用这 4 个技巧在 Project Genie 中创建新世界
items.summary_zh: 详细了解 Google DeepMind 的 Project Genie 以及如何编写提示来创建您自己的世界。

items.title: Sustaining diplomacy amid competition in US-China relations
items.summary: At MIT, former U.S. ambassador to China Nicholas Burns highlights climate change as an area for diplomatic engagement, while exploring areas including China's emphasis on STEM education.
items.title_zh: 中美关系竞争中的可持续外交
items.summary_zh: 在麻省理工学院，前美国驻华大使尼古拉斯·伯恩斯强调气候变化是外交接触的一个领域，同时探讨了包括中国对 STEM 教育的重视等领域。

items.title: 3 Questions: On the future of AI and the mathematical and physical sciences
items.summary: Professor Jesse Thaler describes a vision for a two-way bridge between artificial intelligence and the mathematical and physical sciences — one that promises to advance both.
items.title_zh: 3 个问题：关于人工智能以及数学和物理科学的未来
items.summary_zh: 杰西·塞勒教授描述了在人工智能与数学和物理科学之间架起一座双向桥梁的愿景——这一桥梁有望推动两者的发展。

items.title: New MIT class uses anthropology to improve chatbots
items.summary: MIT computer science students design AI chatbots to help young users become more social, and socially confident.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院的新课程利用人类学来改进聊天机器人
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院计算机科学专业的学生设计人工智能聊天机器人，帮助年轻用户变得更加社交和社交自信。

items.title: A better method for planning complex visual tasks
items.summary: A new hybrid system could help robots navigate in changing environments or increase the efficiency of multirobot assembly teams.
items.title_zh: 规划复杂视觉任务的更好方法
items.summary_zh: 新的混合系统可以帮助机器人在不断变化的环境中导航或提高多机器人装配团队的效率。

items.title: A “ChatGPT for spreadsheets” helps solve difficult engineering challenges faster
items.summary: The approach could help engineers tackle extremely complex design problems, from power grid optimization to vehicle design.
